title: Sales Engineer (GPU Solutions & Hardware)
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Engage with customers who have GPU leasing requirements, particularly for NVIDIA GPU solutions

  • Support sales activities related to workstations, GPU cards, and server-grade hardware, including mid-sized and entry-level GPUs (e.g. NVIDIA L40 or similar)

  • Understand customer technical and business requirements and propose suitable GPU, hardware, or infrastructure solutions

  • Work closely with the sales team to provide technical consultation, solution design, and pre-sales support

  • Prepare and deliver product presentations, solution proposals, and technical documentation
    Liaise with internal teams and vendors to ensure accurate solution configuration and pricing

  • Stay updated on NVIDIA product lines, GPU trends, and data center technologies


Requirements:

  • Diploma or higher qualification in IT, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in IT sales, pre-sales, or a related technology role

  • Solid understanding of NVIDIA GPU products and their use cases (AI, rendering, compute, virtualization, etc.)

  • Hands-on knowledge or experience with hardware systems, servers, workstations, or data center environments

  • Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders

  • Strong presentation, problem-solving, and interpersonal skills

  • Self-motivated, well-organized, and able to work independently



To Apply, please kindly email your updated resume to weizhe.teoh@tg-hr.com

Regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

CEI: R25127749

EA License: 14C7275

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
